title: Contract Risk Triage
trigger: Review a contract, compare two NDAs, identify risky clauses

steps.desc: Run clause-level risk analysis on the contract
Diff two versions side-by-side if applicable
Get rewrite options for flagged clauses
Deep reasoning on highest-risk clause (MCP sampling)
Export formatted .docx risk report

title: Negotiation Prep
trigger: Buyer/seller wants to know what to push back on

steps.desc: Per-clause accept/negotiate/reject guide with fallback language
Alternative phrasings for clauses flagged 'negotiate'
If real file: run analyze_document first, apply logic manually

title: Contract Metadata Lookup
trigger: What is the governing law / term / liability cap in this contract

steps.desc: Extract parties, dates, governing law, term, liability cap, payment terms as JSON

title: Privilege-Safe AI Review
trigger: Can I paste this into ChatGPT / Claude? Is this privileged?

steps.desc: Assess routing risk against Heppner and ABA Rule 1.6
On HIGH/CRITICAL: advise against routing; suggest ollama (local, zero-retention)

title: Legal Research
trigger: Find precedents for …, what does this statute say, research this issue

steps.desc: Keyword-ranked case search across local seed data
Full statutory text with legislative history
Multi-source: cases + statutes + optional CourtListener
Validate every citation before presenting
Live CourtListener/PACER query (only if local results insufficient and integration enabled)

title: Brief / Motion Drafting
trigger: Draft a motion, outline this brief, argument structure

steps.desc: Outline from brief framework by case type
IRAC-style argument scaffold
Issue-statement framework from facts + law
Pull supporting precedents for each argument

title: Citation Cleanup
trigger: Validate citations, normalize Bluebook format, check integrity

steps.desc: Validate citation structure and reporter
Normalize to Bluebook-style abbreviations
Cross-check citation against case database

title: Batch Document Analysis
trigger: Analyze multiple contracts or documents in the background

steps.desc: Queue each document; receive job IDs
List all jobs with status and timestamps
Poll status for in-progress jobs
Retrieve completed analysis result
